hero_subtitle: Helping others make sense of the unexplained
hero_body: Once known as the Research Society Virginia Paranormal, we are a team committed to investigating and assisting with paranormal activity. Our mission is to help others make sense of the unexplained with professionalism, integrity, and compassion.
